1: # Implementation Plan: Pooja Product Management System
2: 
3: This plan outlines the implementation of a fully dynamic, production-ready Pooja Product Management System. It links all dynamic textual data to Supabase PostgreSQL, uploads all media assets to Cloudflare R2, and provides an administrative interface featuring a real-time live preview.
4: 
5: ## Proposed Architecture
6: 
7: ```mermaid
8: graph TD
9:     subgraph Client-Side Admin Panel
10:         Form[Pooja Product Editor Form]
11:         R2Upload[R2 Upload Utility]
12:         Preview[Live Preview Component]
13:     end
14: 
15:     subgraph Storage
16:         R2[(Cloudflare R2 Bucket)]
17:     end
18: 
19:     subgraph Database
20:         Supabase[(Supabase PostgreSQL)]
21:     end
22: 
23:     Form -->|Drag & Drop Image| R2Upload
24:     R2Upload -->|Upload binary| R2
25:     R2 -->|Return Public URL| Form
26:     Form -->|Save Product Data + Image URLs| Supabase
27:     Form -->|State Sync| Preview
28: ```
29: 
30: ---
31: 
32: ## Proposed Changes
33: 
34: ### 1. Database Schema Migration
35: Create a SQL migration file to establish a detailed product schema in Supabase:
36: #### [NEW] [03_create_website_pooja_products.sql](file:///Users/sahilpatel/Desktop/New_Mantra_puja/Store/src/migrations/03_create_website_pooja_products.sql)
37: - Creates `public.website_pooja_products` table containing:
38:   - Textual fields: `name`, `sanskrit_name`, `short_name`, `slug` (unique index), `category`, `subtitle`, `short_description`, `description`, `spiritual_significanc
<truncated 1471 bytes>
oint using the credentials loaded from `.env.local`.
54: - Upload binary assets under organized prefixes (e.g. `products/thumbnails/`, `products/gallery/`, `priests/`) and return the CDN public URL.
55: 
56: ### 4. Admin Panel & Editor Form
57: #### [MODIFY] [AdminPanelPage.tsx](file:///Users/sahilpatel/Desktop/New_Mantra_puja/Store/src/components/AdminPanelPage.tsx)
58: - Create a new administration management section for **Pooja Products**.
59: - Implement a comprehensive editor form:
60:   - Form validations, live slug generation, dynamic input arrays for tags, benefits, FAQS, samagri, and testimonials.
61:   - Image upload zones linked to the Cloudflare R2 uploader.
62:   - Lifecycle controls (Publish, Unpublish, Schedule publish date).
63: - **Live Preview Pane**: Render a split layout with the form on the left, and a real-time responsive rendering of the storefront product card and full detailed pooja page on the right. Form changes will synchronize instantly using React state binding.
64: 
65: ### 5. Storefront Integration
66: #### [MODIFY] [ProductCard.tsx](file:///Users/sahilpatel/Desktop/New_Mantra_puja/Store/src/components/ProductCard.tsx) and [ProductDetailPage.tsx](file:///Users/sahilpatel/Desktop/New_Mantra_puja/Store/src/components/ProductDetailPage.tsx)
67: - Update storefront rendering components to read the new dynamic schema properties (e.g., Sanskrit titles, dynamic samagri grids, duration counters, accordion FAQs).
68: 
69: ---
70: 
71: ## Verification Plan
72: 
73: ### Automated Tests
74: - Run `npm run build` to verify there are no compilation or typing issues.
75: 
76: ### Manual Verification
77: - Test image upload functionality in the admin panel to ensure the files are successfully saved to Cloudflare R2 and their URLs are written to Supabase.
78: - Test real-time rendering in the editor preview.
79: - Verify user registration, login, and product page rendering displays all Supabase values correctly.
80:
